message:
chore: Re-export new modules and sync beads tracking

Update library re-exports to expose newly added functionality:

fastmcp-server/src/lib.rs:
- Add `pub mod docket` for distributed task queue

fastmcp-transport/src/lib.rs:
- Add `pub mod http` for HTTP transport

fastmcp/src/lib.rs (main facade):
- Re-export `http` from fastmcp_transport
- Re-export `docket` from fastmcp_server
- Users can now access via `fastmcp::http` and `fastmcp::docket`

Also sync .beads/issues.jsonl with current issue states.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
